raw_text:
<think>
The user wants a three-line status record, plain text with key=value lines. The fields are route_verdict, repair_target, blocked_move. The values are given: route_verdict=CONTINUE, repair_target=preserve source-grounded reasoning, blocked_move=do not invent source IDs. They ask to return the three-line status record. So output exactly:

route_verdict=CONTINUE
repair_target=preserve source-grounded reasoning
blocked_move=do not invent source IDs

No extra headings or formatting.
</think>

route_verdict=CONTINUE
repair_target=preserve source-grounded reasoning
blocked_move=do not invent source IDs
